title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Liberty Shoes

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Liberty Shoes
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Liberty Shoes! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Liberty Shoes:
Liberty Shoes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes!
